title: Trade Federation Merchant Fleet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Trade Federation Merchant Fleet''', also known as the '''Trade Federation cargo fleet''', was the commercial trade fleet of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], consisting of [[Lucrehulk-class LH-3210 cargo freighter/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class LH-3210 cargo freighters]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1999-05-04 -->''[[Star Wars: Episode I Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' {{C|as Trade Federation cargo fleet}}
*<!-- 2001-02-08 -->''[[Secrets of Naboo]]''
